programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: The circumstances surrounding the death of crime novelist Harlan Thrombey are mysterious, but there's one thing that renowned Detective Benoit Blanc knows for sure -- everyone in the wildly dysfunctional Thrombey family is a suspect. Now, Blanc must sift through a web of lies and red herrings to uncover the truth.

programme.title: You're Killing Me
programme.desc: While facing declining sales at a book convention, bestselling mystery author Allie Chandler investigates the suspicious death of a close friend, only to clash with new police detective Jack Kerrigan and ambitious young podcaster Andi Walker.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Playboy vet Henry sets his heart on romancing Lucy, but she has short-term memory loss. She can't remember anything that happened the day before. So every morning, Henry has to woo her again. Her friends and family are very protective and Henry must convince them that he's in it for love.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo Boyd (Gerard Butler), a down-on-his-luck bounty hunter, thinks he's seeing an upswing in fortune when he gets a call to bring in his bail-jumping ex-wife, a reporter named Nicole (Jennifer Aniston). programme.title: Bull Durham
programme.desc: In Durham, N.C., the Bulls minor league baseball team has one asset no other can claim: a poetry-loving groupie named Annie Savoy (Susan Sarandon). programme.title: Drinking Made Easy
programme.desc: Drinking Blue Hawaiians on a helicopter; Kilohana Plantation; aphrodisiacs.

programme.title: Drinking Made Easy
programme.desc: A flaming Absinthe drink; Zane and Steve golf Pebble Beach for their six-pack challenge; a "Wild Man" wine-maker.

programme.title: Drinking Made Easy
programme.desc: Following Ernest Hemingway; Pat Croce's iconic bars; drinking on Duval Street.

programme.title: Stoker
programme.desc: India Stoker's (Mia Wasikowska) world comes crashing down when her father (Jacki Weaver) dies in a car accident. Adding to the girl's emotional turmoil is the sudden arrival of Charlie (Matthew Goode), an uncle whom she never knew existed. Charlie moves in with India and her unstable mother (Nicole Kidman), and soon India begins to suspect that this charming and mysterious man has ulterior motives

programme.title: The Rock
programme.desc: FBI chemical warfare expert Stanley Goodspeed (Nicolas Cage) is sent on an urgent mission with a former British spy, John Patrick Mason (Sean Connery), to stop Gen. Francis X. Hummel (Ed Harris) from launching chemical weapons on Alcatraz Island into San Francisco. Gen. Hummel demands $100 million in war reparations to be paid to the families of slain servicemen who died on covert operations. Afte

programme.title: Contagion
programme.desc: When Beth Emhoff returns to Minnesota from a Hong Kong business trip, she attributes the malaise she feels to jet lag. However, two days later, Beth is dead, and doctors tell her shocked husband that they have no idea what killed her. Soon, many others start to exhibit the same symptoms, and a global pandemic explodes. Doctors try to contain the lethal microbe, but society begins to collapse as a

programme.title: War for the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Caesar (Andy Serkis) and his apes are forced into a deadly conflict with an army of humans led by a ruthless colonel (Woody Harrelson). After the apes suffer unimaginable losses, Caesar wrestles with his darker instincts and begins his own mythic quest to avenge his kind. As the journey finally brings them face to face, Caesar and the colonel are pitted against each other in an epic battle that wi

programme.title: X-Men: First Class
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with ot

programme.title: A History of Violence
programme.desc: When a pair of petty criminals attempt to rob his small-town diner, Tom Stall (Viggo Mortensen) quickly and easily kills them both. In the flush of news coverage of Tom's seemingly heroic actions, a threatening stranger named Carl Fogarty (Ed Harris) comes to town, fingering the unassuming family man as long-missing Philadelphia mobster Joey Cusack. To the horror of his wife, Edie (Maria Bello), a

programme.title: Queer
programme.desc: Lee, a solitary American in Mexico City, falls for a beautiful, elusive former soldier. Journeying together into the jungle, Lee sees, for the first time, the possibility of an intimate and infinite love.

programme.title: Pawn
programme.desc: A robbery turns into a tense hostage situation when three gunmen hold up a diner the mob uses as a front.

programme.title: Room
programme.desc: Held captive for years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

programme.title: Shot Caller
programme.desc: Recently released from prison, a gang member finds himself forced by his leaders to orchestrate a major crime with a rival gang.

programme.title: Waitress: The Musical
programme.desc: Jenna Hunterson is a waitress and expert pie maker stuck in a small town and a loveless marriage. When a baking contest offers her a chance at escape, Jenna fights to reclaim part of herself.

programme.title: Chasing Mavericks
programme.desc: When 15-year-old surfing phenomenon Jay Moriarty discovers that the mythic Mavericks surf break, one of the biggest waves on Earth, actually exists near his California home, he becomes determined to conquer it. Jay enlists the aid of local surfing legend Frosty Hesson to train him to ride the Mavericks and live to tell about it. As Jay and Frosty carry on their quest to achieve the impossible, the

programme.title: Yogi Bear
programme.desc: Yogi and his sidekick, Boo Boo, are Jellystone Park's most-notorious troublemakers, hatching countless schemes to separate park visitors from their vittles. Standing in the way of picnic perfection is their long-suffering nemesis, Ranger Smith. But when Mayor Brown announces his plans to sell Jellystone Park to loggers, Yogi, Boo Boo and Ranger Smith must join forces to save their beloved campgrou

programme.title: Spare Parts
programme.desc: With the help of their high school's newest teacher (George Lopez), four Hispanic students form a robotics club. Although they have no experience, the youths set their sights on a national robotics contest. With $800 and parts scavenged from old cars, they build a robot and compete against reigning champion MIT. Along the way, the students learn not only how to build a robot but something far more

programme.title: Cleaner
programme.desc: Hoping to expose corruption, radical activists take 300 hostages at an energy company's annual gala in a high-rise building. Their cause soon gets hijacked by an extremist within their ranks who's ready to kill everyone. It's now up to a former soldier who works as a window cleaner to save the hostages trapped inside, including her younger brother.

programme.title: The Terminator
programme.desc: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against the

programme.title: Trap
programme.desc: A man and his teenage daughter realize they're at the center of a dark and sinister event while watching a concert.

programme.title: Hitchcock
programme.desc: Following his great success with "North by Northwest," director Alfred Hitchcock makes a daring choice for his next project: an adaptation of Robert Bloch's novel "Psycho." When the studio refuses to back the picture, Hitchcock decides to pay for it himself in exchange for a percentage of the profits. His wife, Alma Reville, has serious reservations about the film but supports him nonetheless. Sti

programme.title: The Belko Experiment
programme.desc: An ordinary day at the office becomes a horrific quest for survival when 80 employees at the Belko Corp. in Bogotá, Colombia, learn that they are pawns in a deadly game. Trapped inside their building, a voice over an intercom tells the frightened staffers that two workers must be killed within 30 minutes. When another ultimatum follows, friends become enemies and new alliances take shape, as only

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express
programme.desc: A lavish trip through Europe quickly unfolds into a race against time to solve a murder aboard a train. When an avalanche stops the Orient Express dead in its tracks, the world's greatest detective -- Hercule Poirot -- arrives to interrogate all passengers and search for clues before the killer can strike again.

programme.title: Destroy All Monsters!
programme.desc: Scientists face Godzilla, Rodan, Mothra and more obscure Japanese monsters sent by she-aliens.

programme.title: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her n

programme.title: Walk the Line
programme.desc: The rise of country music legend Johnny Cash (Joaquin Phoenix) begins with his days as a boy growing up on the family farm, where he struggles under the scorn of his father (Robert Patrick). As the years pass, Cash ends up in Memphis, Tenn., with his wife, Vivian (Ginnifer Goodwin), and breaks into the music scene after finding his trademark sound. While on tour, Cash meets the love of his life, s

programme.title: It's Complicated
programme.desc: Jane (Meryl Streep), a successful restaurateur, has been divorced from Jake (Alec Baldwin) for many years, although they remain friends. When an innocent meal together turns into an affair, Jane finds that she is the other woman in the now-remarried Jake's life. Meanwhile, Adam (Steve Martin), an architect hired to remodel her kitchen, is still stinging from his own divorce. He finds himself falli

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Supervillain Gru, a man who delights in all things wicked, hatches a plan to steal the moon. Surrounded by an army of little yellow minions and his impenetrable arsenal of weapons and war machines, Gru prepares to vanquish all who stand in his way. However, nothing in his calculations and groundwork has prepared him for his greatest challenge: three adorable orphan girls who want to make him their

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Gigan
programme.desc: Godzilla and Anguirus fight three-headed dragon Ghidorah and huge bird Gigan at a cartoonist's theme park.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Mechagodzilla
programme.desc: An Okinawan monster-god helps Godzilla defeat his bionic double.

programme.title: Godzilla, King of the Monsters!
programme.desc: A U.S. newsman (Raymond Burr) in Tokyo recounts the story of a huge dinosaur roused from the sea by an atomic blast.

programme.title: Heaven Help Us
programme.desc: In the 1960s, a group of teen pranksters finds it difficult to toe the line in a strictly disciplined Catholic school.

programme.title: Margaret
programme.desc: New York high-school student Lisa Cohen (Anna Paquin) inadvertently causes an accident in which a bus driver (Mark Ruffalo) runs over a pedestrian (Allison Janney). Guilt-stricken over her role in the woman's death, Lisa's mood swings from normal to furious, with her angry outbursts mostly directed at her mother (J. Smith-Cameron). Lisa reaches out to the dead woman's best friend (Jeannie Berlin)

programme.title: Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: Young Valerie (Amanda Seyfried) feels torn between two men. She loves Peter, but her parents intend that she marry wealthy Henry. Valerie and Peter are going to run away together, but her sister is killed by a werewolf before they can put their plan into action. The villagers call on the help of Father Solomon (Gary Oldman), a famous monster hunter who warns that the beast takes human form by day.

programme.title: Kiss of the Spider Woman
programme.desc: In a prison cell somewhere in Latin America, two very different men warily confront each other. Molina (William Hurt) is first seen wrapping his head in a towel, in the shape of a turban, while Valentin (Raul Julia), bearded and classically macho in appearance, watches with a mixture of fascination and revulsion. During the time spent together, the two men come to understand and respect each other

programme.title: Don't Tell Mom the Babysitter's Dead
programme.desc: Sue Ellen Crandell is a teenager eagerly awaiting her mother's summer-long absence. While the babysitter looks after her rambunctious younger siblings, Sue Ellen can party and have fun. But then the babysitter abruptly dies, leaving the Crandells short on cash. Sue Ellen finds a sweet job in fashion by lying about her age and experience on her résumé. But, while her siblings run wild, she discover

programme.title: The Art of Getting By
programme.desc: George (Freddie Highmore) is a senior at a posh Manhattan prep school, but his disaffected attitude leaves little room for toeing the line. He'd rather doodle and read philosophy, and he strenuously avoids his parents (Rita Wilson, Sam Robards) whenever possible. Unfortunately, George's attitude is endangering his chances of graduating. Then he meets Sally (Emma Roberts). George finds himself fall

programme.title: House of 1000 Corpses
programme.desc: An empty fuel tank and a flat tire lead two couples down a terror-riddled road to the House of 1000 Corpses. House of 1000 Corpses is at its core a story of family - a cast of twisted individuals who, with each slash of a throat or stab through the chest, add bodies to their sick human menagerie.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Chief Warrant Officer Roy Miller and his team of inspectors are on a mission in 2003 to find Iraq's reported stockpiles of weapons of mass destruction. Traveling from one dangerous site to another, Miller and his team fail to find any chemical agents or other weapons. Instead, they discover an elaborate coverup in which the most-elusive weapon is truth.

programme.title: The Man
programme.desc: Seeking the gunrunners who killed his partner, undercover cop Derrick Vann (Samuel L. Jackson) sets up a sting. He arranges to meet an arms dealer at a diner, where he'll be the only one reading USA Today. But dentist Andy Fiddler (Eugene Levy), who's in Detroit for a conference, is there reading the same paper, and the dealer mistakes him for Vann and sets up the deal. When Vann realizes this, he

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: Beneath Easter Island, in a giant factory that manufactures the world's Easter candy, the popular rabbit is preparing to pass the mantle to his son, E.B. (Russell Brand). But E.B. has no interest in the job and would rather be a drummer. He runs away to Los Angeles, where an unemployed slacker named Fred O'Hare (James Marsden) accidentally runs into him. Feigning injury, E.B. tricks Fred into givi

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Based on the beloved Roald Dahl tale, this comedic and fantastical film follows young Charlie Bucket (Freddie Highmore) and his Grandpa Joe (David Kelly) as they join a small group of contest winners who get to tour the magical and mysterious factory of eccentric candy maker Willy Wonka (Johnny Depp). Aided by his diminutive Oompa Loompa workers (Deep Roy), Wonka has a hidden motivation for the to

programme.title: Switch
programme.desc: Steve Brooks (Perry King), a sexist womanizer, is killed by a group of his angry former lovers. In heaven, he makes a bargain with God for redemption and agrees to return to Earth. Once there, he must have a sincere relationship with a female and make her fall in love with him. If not, Steve's soul will become the property of the devil (Bruce Martyn Payne). programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: Aspiring actor Edward undergoes a radical medical procedure to drastically transform his appearance. But his new dream face turns into a nightmare as he becomes obsessed with reclaiming what he lost.

programme.title: The Wolfman
programme.desc: Though absent from his ancestral home of Blackmoor for many years, aristocrat Lawrence Talbot returns to find his missing brother at the request of the latter's fiancée, Gwen. He learns that a creature has links to an ancient curse turning people into werewolves when the moon is full. programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Now that Chris and his girlfriend, Rose, have reached the meet-the-parents milestone of dating, she invites him for a weekend getaway with Missy and Dean. At first, Chris reads the family's overly accommodating behavior as nervous attempts to deal with their daughter's interracial relationship, but as the weekend progresses, a series of increasingly disturbing discoveries leads him to a truth that

programme.title: Abraham Lincoln: Vampire Hunter
programme.desc: While still a boy, Abraham Lincoln loses his mother to a vampire's bite. He vows revenge, but fails in the attempt, narrowly escaping with his life. He is rescued by Henry (Dominic Cooper), a charismatic vampire hunter who instructs Abe in the fine art of dispatching bloodsuckers. Abe (Benjamin Walker) continues his fight against the undead well into adulthood and his presidency, making a last sta

programme.title: Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers
programme.desc: This installment marks the return of the seemingly indestructible masked murderer Michael Myers (George P. Wilbur), who is targeting Tommy Doyle (Paul Stephen Rudd), a young man tied into the legacy of the killer and his connections with the Strode family. programme.title: Halloween H20: 20 Years Later
programme.desc: Two decades after surviving a massacre on October 31, 1978, former babysitter Laurie Strode finds herself hunted by persistent knife-wielder Michael Myers. Laurie now lives in Northern California under an assumed name, where she works as the headmistress of a private school. But it's not far enough to escape Myers, who soon discovers her whereabouts. programme.title: Halloween: Resurrection
programme.desc: He's back for more... When a group of teens wins a contest to spend a night in Michael Myers' childhood home to be broadcast live on the Internet, they believe they are in for a little fun and some free publicity. But things go frightfully wrong and the game turns into a struggle to make it out of the house alive.

programme.title: The Watchers
programme.desc: A 28-year-old artist gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. Finding shelter, she unknowingly becomes trapped alongside three strangers who are stalked by mysterious creatures every night.

programme.title: Extraction
programme.desc: A government analyst (Kellan Lutz) launches his own rescue mission when terrorists kidnap his father (Bruce Willis), a retired CIA operative.

programme.title: Life as We Know It
programme.desc: After a disastrous first date, the only things Holly Berenson and Eric Messer have in common are mutual dislike and their love for their goddaughter, Sophie. When they unexpectedly become her caretakers, Holly and Eric have to put aside their differences and learn to work together for the sake of the child. Juggling competing career and social commitments, Holly and Eric look for common ground whi

programme.title: The Best Exotic Marigold Hotel
programme.desc: Some British retirees (Judi Dench, Maggie Smith, Bill Nighy) decide to outsource their retirement to exotic -- and less expensive -- India. Lured by advertisements for the newly restored Marigold Hotel and imagining a life of leisure in lush surroundings, they arrive and find that the Marigold is actually a shell of its former self. programme.title: Due Date
programme.desc: Peter Highman will be a dad for the first time when his wife gives birth in five days. programme.title: Bad Santa
programme.desc: In this dark comedy, the crotchety Willie T. Stokes (Billy Bob Thornton) and his partner (Tony Cox) reunite once a year for a holiday con. programme.title: Bad Santa 2
programme.desc: Fueled by cheap whiskey, greed and hatred, Willie Soke (Billy Bob Thornton) teams up with his angry little sidekick, Marcus, to knock off a Chicago charity on Christmas Eve. programme.title: Parental Guidance
programme.desc: Minor-league baseball announcer Artie Decker (Billy Crystal) and his wife, Diane (Bette Midler), get to see their only child, Alice (Marisa Tomei), very seldom. programme.title: The Lost Husband
programme.desc: A widow and her children move to her estranged aunt's farm in Texas.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Aspiring country singer Patsy Cline (Jessica Lange) is resigned to both her thankless gigs and her unhappy marriage, until she meets the charismatic Charlie Dick (Ed Harris). Eventually leaving her husband to marry Charlie, Patsy temporarily shelves her performing career to be a mother. programme.title: Annabelle
programme.desc: John Form thinks he's found the perfect gift for his expectant wife, Mia: a vintage doll in a beautiful white dress. However, the couple's delight doesn't last long: One terrible night, devil worshipers invade their home and launch a violent attack against the couple. programme.title: Annabelle: Creation
programme.desc: Former toy maker Sam Mullins and his wife, Esther, are happy to welcome a nun and six orphaned girls into their California farmhouse. Years earlier, the couple's 7-year-old daughter Annabelle died in a tragic car accident. Terror soon strikes when one child sneaks into a forbidden room and finds a seemingly innocent doll that appears to have a life of its own.

programme.title: Annabelle Comes Home
programme.desc: Determined to keep Annabelle from wreaking more havoc, paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren lock the possessed doll in the artifacts room in their house. But when the doll awakens the room's evil spirits, it soon becomes an unholy night of terror for the couple's 10-year-old daughter, her friends and their young baby sitter.

programme.title: Nerve
programme.desc: Industrious high school senior Vee Delmonico (Emma Roberts) is tired of living life on the sidelines. Pressured by her friends, Vee decides to join Nerve, a popular online game that challenges players to accept a series of dares. programme.title: Cleaner
programme.desc: Hoping to expose corruption, radical activists take 300 hostages at an energy company's annual gala in a high-rise building. It's now up to a former soldier who works as a window cleaner to save the hostages trapped inside, including her younger brother.

programme.title: Shot Caller
programme.desc: Recently released from prison, a gang member finds himself forced by his leaders to orchestrate a major crime with a rival gang.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: After the death of Richard the Lion-Hearted, a skilled archer named Robin Longstride travels to Nottingham, where villagers suffer under a despotic sheriff and crippling taxation. programme.title: Lord of the Flies

programme.title: Walkabout

Macy) is a car salesman in Minneapolis who has gotten himself into debt and is so desperate for money that he hires two thugs (Steve Buscemi), (Peter Stormare) to kidnap his own wife. programme.desc: A brother and sister uncover a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

programme.title: The Front Room

programme.title: Y2K

When the pair surfaces, they make out a vessel in the distance, but it does not immediately set in

In the spirit of the samurai, he has pledged his loyalty to a small time mobster named Louie (John Tormey) who saved his life many years before.

programme.desc: American automotive designer Carroll Shelby and fearless British race car driver Ken Miles battle corporate interference, the laws of physics and their own personal demons to build a revolutionary vehicle for the Ford Motor Co. programme.desc: After flying to her friend's wedding, a lawyer begins a fling with a stranger she met on the plane. But when her passport disappears and no one at the wedding has ever heard of him, she realizes the man she trusted may have trapped her in paradise.

programme.title: My Husband's Other Wife
programme.desc: Kelli discovers that her husband, Ty, has been leading a double life and is secretly married to another woman. When Ty dies unexpectedly in a fiery car accident, she starts to suspect that he faked his death and is planning to kill her.

programme.title: The Chi
programme.desc: The South Side of Chicago carries daily danger, and the smallest and simplest of decisions can have life or death consequences for the residents. Life continues as the kids prep for school and their parents shuffle off to work. The young adults of the area are trying to scrape a living for themselves, while the elders sit on their front porches and observe the goings on. The South Side has the pot

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: Following a 10-year prison stint, Driver (Dwayne Johnson) sprints through the gates to take vengeance on those responsible for his brother's murder. Within hours of dispatching his first one, he has two men on his tail: a veteran police officer (Billy Bob Thornton) and an eager assassin (Oliver Jackson-Cohen). Driver tries to stay a step ahead of his pursuers, but there are hints that his list is

programme.title: Southpaw

However, when tragedy strikes, Billy hits rock bottom, losing his family, his house and his manager. programme.title: Barron's Cove
programme.desc: A man with a violent past kidnaps the boy he holds responsible for his son's death. As he grows closer to uncovering the truth, he's left to wonder whether his pursuers are really seeking to protect the boy, or merely the secrets he keeps.

programme.title: The Gambler
programme.desc: Literature professor Jim Bennett (Mark Wahlberg) leads a secret life as a high-stakes gambler. Always a risk-taker, Bennett bets it all when he borrows from a gangster and offers his own life as collateral. Staying one step ahead, he pits his creditor against the operator of an illicit gambling ring while garnering the attention of Frank (John Goodman), a paternalistic loan shark. As his relations

programme.title: Here Comes the Boom
programme.desc: Once a collegiate wrestler, Scott Voss (Kevin James) is now a 42-year-old, apathetic biology teacher in a failing high school. When cutbacks threaten the school's music program and its teacher (Henry Winkler), Scott springs into action. programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: This live action feature is inspired by the most successful interactive video-game character in history -- Lara Croft. Beautiful and brainy, Lara is the heroine of Eidos Interactive's phenomenally successful "Tomb Raider" game series. It is one woman's fearless quest crisscrossing the globe, in an amazing attempt to save the world.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: When cops Schmidt and Jenko join the secret Jump Street unit, they use their youthful appearances to go undercover as high-school students. They trade in their guns and badges for backpacks, and set out to shut down a dangerous drug ring. programme.title: 22 Jump Street
programme.desc: Although they made their way through high school successfully, an investigation at a local college brings big changes for undercover officers Jenko and Schmidt. When Jenko meets a kindred spirit on the football team and Schmidt infiltrates the bohemian art-major scene, both men begin to question their partnership. Not only do they have to crack the case, but now the two overgrown adolescents must

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: The sleepy little town of Woodsboro just woke up screaming. There's a killer in their midst who's seen a few too many scary movies. Suddenly nobody is safe, as the psychopath stalks victims, taunts them with trivia questions, then rips them to bloody shreds. It could be anybody...

programme.title: Couples Therapy
programme.desc: "Couples Therapy" is a documentary series following couples as they seek the help of psychoanalyst Dr. Orna Guralnik with their troubled relationships; coming off their previous success with the award-winning documentary "Weiner", executive producers Josh Kriegman and Elyse Steinberg are collaborating on the unscripted series that will feature real couples from New York City and its surrounding ar

programme.title: Head of State

programme.title: Persona

programme.desc: After her husband dies in an act of senseless violence, Audrey Burke (Halle Berry) is left alone with two young children and no idea how to cope. programme.title: Run

Fox), her fairy godmother, and is bestowed with a magical talent that requires her to obey anything that she is told to do. programme.desc: Arnold (Spencer Klein) and his pal, Gerald (Jamil Walker Smith), learn their beloved neighborhood is about to be torn down by a greedy developer named Scheck (Paul Sorvino) to build a mall. programme.desc: After learning that a young pig's days are numbered, a literate spider (Julia Roberts) weaves an elaborate plan to save her friend from the butcher's block.

programme.title: Mirror Mirror
programme.desc: Snow White (Lily Collins), an orphaned princess, is the rightful ruler of her kingdom, but a jealous, evil queen (Julia Roberts) schemes to gain control. programme.title: The Longshots

With his niece Jasmine (Keke Palmer) installed as the team's quarterback and secret weapon, Curtis has a chance to turn his life around, while the residents of Minden have a chance to recapture their team spirit and civic pride.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick

programme.title: Hot Rod
programme.desc: For Rod Kimball (Andy Samberg), performing stunts is a way of life, even though he is rather accident-prone. Poor Rod cannot even get any respect from his stepfather, Frank (Ian McShane), who beats him up in weekly sparring matches. When Frank falls ill, Rod devises his most outrageous stunt yet to raise money for Frank's operation -- and then Rod will kick Frank's butt.

programme.title: Dean
programme.desc: An illustrator falls in love with a woman while trying to keep his father from burning down the family home after his wife dies.

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: As Adm. James T. Kirk (William Shatner) and Capt. Spock (Leonard Nimoy) monitor trainees at Starfleet Academy, another vessel from the United Federation of Planets is about to try out the planet-creating Genesis Device in a seemingly deserted portion of space. programme.title: Killerman
programme.desc: Moe Diamond is a New York City money launderer who wakes up with no memory and millions of dollars in stolen cash and drugs. He must soon scour the streets in search of answers while trying to dodge a crew of violent and crooked cops.

programme.title: Most Wanted
programme.desc: An investigative reporter fights to expose the twisted truth behind a heroin bust orchestrated by dirty cops to frame an innocent man -- sentencing him to life in a Thai prison.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men
programme.desc: While out hunting, Llewelyn Moss (Josh Brolin) finds the grisly aftermath of a drug deal. Though he knows better, he cannot resist the cash left behind and takes it with him. The hunter becomes the hunted when a merciless killer named Chigurh (Javier Bardem) picks up his trail. Also looking for Moss is Sheriff Bell (Tommy Lee Jones), an aging lawman who reflects on a changing world and a dark secr

programme.title: Distant Thunder
programme.desc: A Chicago teenager (Ralph Macchio) searches the Pacific Northwest woods for his Vietnam-veteran father (John Lithgow).

programme.title: The Corrupted
programme.desc: Released from prison, a talented boxer wants nothing more than to reconnect with his young son and live a quiet life. But when his brother gets on the wrong side of a shady developer, he must risk everything to save his sibling before it's too late.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a traveling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: The Outlaws
programme.desc: A group of outlaws awaken to their empty train heist bag. Interrogations begin as each cowboy becomes the focus in an attempt to unmask the thief among them. Tensions mount as each bandit struggles to clear their name before bullets fly.

programme.title: Breakdown
programme.desc: While traveling to California, Taylor and his wife, Amy, experience a vehicle malfunction on a remote highway. Amy Taylor accepts a ride from a truck driver to seek assistance while Jeff Taylor remains with the vehicle. When the couple fails to reunite at a designated location, Jeff Taylor begins a search for his wife despite a lack of assistance from local residents or law enforcement.

programme.title: Day of the Fight
programme.desc: On the day of his first fight since his release from prison, a former boxing champion reconnects with his trainer, ex-wife, childhood friend, and abusive father in a quest for forgiveness and closure.

programme.desc: Following the death of Vesper Lynd, James Bond (Daniel Craig) makes his next mission personal. Bond learns that Greene is plotting to gain total control of a vital natural resource, and he must navigate a minefield of danger and tre

programme.title: Borrego
programme.desc: After witnessing a drug mule's plane crash in the Borrego desert, Elly is kidnapped and forced on a dangerous journey to a remote drop-off point. With limited essentials and alone in the desert with her captor, desperation for survival takes hold as Elly risks her life to escape from his clutches before the trip turns deadly.

programme.title: Face/Off
programme.desc: Obsessed with bringing terrorist Castor Troy (Nicolas Cage) to justice, FBI agent Sean Archer (John Travolta) tracks down Troy, who has boarded a plane in Los Angeles. After the plane crashes and Troy is severely injured, possibly dead, Archer undergoes surgery to remove his face and replace it with Troy's. As Archer tries to use his disguise to elicit information about a bomb from Troy's brother,

programme.title: Homefront
programme.desc: Hoping to escape from his troubled past, former DEA agent Phil Broker moves to a seemingly quiet backwater town in the bayou with his daughter. However, he finds anything but quiet there, for the town is riddled with drugs and violence. When Gator Bodine, a sociopathic drug lord, puts the newcomer and his young daughter in harm's way, Broker is forced back into action to save her and their home. B

programme.title: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: Following the death of Vesper Lynd, James Bond (Daniel Craig) makes his next mission personal. The hunt for those who blackmailed his lover leads him to ruthless businessman Dominic Greene (Mathieu Amalric), a key player in the organization which coerced Vesper. Bond learns that Greene is plotting to gain total control of a vital natural resource, and he must navigate a minefield of danger and tre

programme.title: Defiance
programme.desc: In 1941, Nazi soldiers are slaughtering Eastern European Jews by the thousands. Three brothers, Tuvia (Daniel Craig), Zus (Liev Schreiber) and Asael (Jamie Bell), manage to escape and take refuge in the forest where they played in childhood. Seeking a way to avenge the deaths of their loved ones, the brothers turn their daily struggle for survival into a battle against the Nazis. As news of their

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: An eight-year-old Amish boy witnesses a drug-related murder in a Philadelphia train station. The Philadelphia police captain discovers that the murderers are cops trying to squelch a corruption investigation.

programme.title: The Hurricane
programme.desc: Denzel Washington is Rubin "Hurricane" Carter, a man whose dreams of winning the middleweight boxing title were destroyed when he was arrested along with another man for the murders of 3 people in a New Jersey bar. Wrongfully accused, Carter and John Artis were sentenced to 3 life terms in prison.

programme.title: Run & Gun
programme.desc: After leaving a life of crime and violence, reformed good guy Ray enjoys a quiet family life in the suburbs. However, Ray's past comes back to haunt him as he gets blackmailed into one last job to collect a mysterious package. After a deadly double-cross, he soon finds himself wounded and on the run from ruthless assassins who will stop at nothing to get what he has.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young lawyer joins a small but prestigious law firm only to find out that most of their clients are on the wrong side of the law. The company is helping to launder mob money, get clients off charges and even murder partners who threaten to blow their cover, but when the FBI come calling to gather evidence on the lawyer's colleagues, he is caught between a rock and a hard place, juggling his life

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: A biochemist with a rare blood disease inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism. Marvel action with Jared Leto.

programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: Six federal agents in hiding after the LA terror attack grow suspicious of each other as they realise the perpetrator could be among them.

programme.title: The Beekeeper
programme.desc: Jason Statham stings the enemy in a brutal hunt for vengeance, which escalates after he is revealed to be part of a powerful organisation. Action-packed Sky Original film.

programme.title: Red Right Hand
programme.desc: When an honest man is forced back into the services of his town's kingpin, he learns to stop at nothing to protect his family. Action thriller starring Orlando Bloom.

programme.title: Italian Job, The
programme.desc: Ex-convict Michael Caine hatches an audacious plan to steal $4 million, involving a bus, two Jaguars and, of course, three Mini Coopers. Comic adventure. Flashing images.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone is the cop brought out of deep freeze in 2032 to hunt down his criminal enemy Wesley Snipes. Sci-fi action with Sandra Bullock. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: Days Of Thunder
programme.desc: Maverick racer Tom Cruise risks all to become a NASCAR champ, wooing Nicole Kidman between laps. Contains strong language, sexual scenes and flashing images.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: Balancing alien heritage with a human upbringing, Superman is drawn into a conflict that challenges his belief in truth and justice.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, a man enters a deadly televised competition. Edgar Wright directs.

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Glen Powell and Daisy Edgar-Jones are put in direct contact with one of nature's most wondrous - and deadly - forces. Adrenaline-pumping sequel.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation.
Spartan king Gerard Butler leads his brave elite warriors against the all-conquering Persian invaders. Strong violence.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood directs his second feature and stars as a hired gun charged with saving a small town from a gang of outlaws. Western starring Verna Bloom and Marianna Hill.

programme.title: The Warriors
programme.desc: Wrongly accused of murder, a New York gang must fight its way back to Coney Island. Cult thriller from 48 Hrs director Walter Hill. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Remakes
programme.desc: It's time to kick off your Sunday shoes with remakes in this edition of the Cinema List. From Footloose to The Italian Job, revisit familiar favourites with a fresh twist.

programme.title: Street Fighter
programme.desc: Action romp based on the hit video game series, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme as a solider taking the fight to crazed military dictator Raul Julia. With Kylie Minogue.

programme.title: Days Of Thunder
programme.desc: Maverick racer Tom Cruise risks all to become a NASCAR champ, wooing Nicole Kidman between laps. Contains strong language, sexual scenes and flashing images.

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: Gerard Butler plays the bodyguard tasked with saving the president when a North Korean mob storms the White House.

programme.title: Kraven The Hunter
programme.desc: Aaron Taylor-Johnson is Kraven, the deadly supervillain on a path to become the greatest - and the most feared - hunter in the world.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: A former member of a singing trio, now running a hotel on a Greek island, is reunited with her old bandmates for her daughter's wedding - but is surprised when three of her old flames also show up unexpectedly. The three men have been invited by the bride, who wants to find out which one of them is her father. Musical comedy, with a soundtrack of Abba songs, starring Meryl Streep, Pierce Brosnan,

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: It's five years since Sophie invited her three possible dads to her wedding, and now most of her family are reunited as she prepares for the grand reopening of the Hotel Bella Donna. Along the way, she learns more about her mother's past. Abba-themed musical sequel, starring Amanda Seyfried, Lily James, Pierce Brosnan, Cher and Andy Garcia.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: An eccentric but brilliant former cop sets himself up to champion the underdog - as a private eye specialising in locating missing animals. The zany detective is called in to find a kidnapped dolphin - the mascot of an American football team - and uncovers a plot involving high-level police corruption. Comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Courteney Cox, Sean Young, Tone Loc and Noble Willingham.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: The eccentric pet detective is coaxed out of self-imposed exile in a Buddhist monastery to visit Africa and help search for a sacred white bat. However, his unique investigative talents are tested to the limits as he faces a race against time to find the missing creature and prevent a tribal war. Comedy sequel, starring Jim Carrey, Simon Callow and Bob Gunton.

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: Jack, a struggling musician, gets hit by a bus during a mysterious event. When he regains consciousness, he finds that he is the only person who can remember the Beatles, and sets out to exploit the opportunity by passing their hits off as his own compositions. Danny Boyle's comedy, starring Himesh Patel and Lily James.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: The disaster-prone journalist seems to have finally found the perfect boyfriend. However, when the couple start to squabble over their personal habits, she decides to decamp for a while to Thailand and write a travelogue. Unfortunately, she has reckoned without the reappearance of a duplicitous old flame - and a spell behind bars in a Thai prison. Romantic comedy sequel, with Renee Zellweger, Coli

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd
programme.desc: The half-witted duo meet for the first time as teenagers and band together to face the perils of high school - and prove they are intelligent enough to leave remedial classes behind. Comedy prequel, starring Eric Christian Olsen, Derek Richardson, Rachel Nichols, Eugene Levy and Mimi Rogers.

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle
programme.desc: Biopic of British sporting underdog Eddie Edwards. Determined to fulfil his dreams of becoming an Olympic athlete, Edwards trains as a ski jumper - a field in which Britain had no other competitors. He secures a place in the 1988 Winter Olympics, where his can-do attitude makes him a media sensation in the face of a losing streak. Starring Taron Egerton, Hugh Jackman and Christopher Walken.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: After being taunted by relatives who think they will never have kids, married couple Pete and Ellie Wagner consider the option of adopting a child. However, they get more than they bargained for when they take in a rebellious teen and her two siblings. Director Sean Anders' comedy, starring Mark Wahlberg, Rose Byrne and Isabela Merced.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: An eccentric but brilliant former cop sets himself up to champion the underdog - as a private eye specialising in locating missing animals. The zany detective is called in to find a kidnapped dolphin - the mascot of an American football team - and uncovers a plot involving high-level police corruption. Comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Courteney Cox, Sean Young, Tone Loc and Noble Willingham.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: The eccentric pet detective is coaxed out of self-imposed exile in a Buddhist monastery to visit Africa and help search for a sacred white bat. However, his unique investigative talents are tested to the limits as he faces a race against time to find the missing creature and prevent a tribal war. Comedy sequel, starring Jim Carrey, Simon Callow and Bob Gunton.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Frank the sausage and the other groceries are promised of the great beyond. When he hears life after the supermarket isn't as much fun as he thought, Frank the sausage investigates. Animated comedy, featuring the voices of Seth Rogen, Kristen Wiig, Jonah Hill and Michael Cera.

programme.title: Honey Don't
programme.desc: California private detective Honey O'Donahue delves into a series of unusual deaths connected to a mysterious church. Co-writer/director Ethan Coen's comedy mystery, starring Margaret Qualley, Aubrey Plaza and Chris Evans.

programme.title: Touch
programme.desc: Icelandic romantic drama. Spanning several decades, a man embarks on an emotional journey to find his first love who disappeared 50 years ago.

programme.title: The End Of The Affair
programme.desc: In World War II London, a writer falls in love with the wife of a British civil servant - but both men suspect her of infidelity with yet another man. Romantic drama.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: Peggy faints and wakes up to find herself back in 1960, leading her to try to spot and correct the mistakes that led to disappointments and an unhappy marriage.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha became close friends while working together at the same magazine. Years later, they meet again in a strangely sweet situation.(107 min).

programme.title: Poison
programme.desc: Dive into the love story of a couple who reunited many years after a tragedy drove them apart. Tim Roth and Trine Dyrholm star.

programme.title: Girl You Know It's True
programme.desc: Biographical music drama exploring the notorious scandal involving 80s dancers Robert Pilatus and Fabrice Morvan's rise to fame.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Julia Roberts plays the gutsy mum who takes on a corporation polluting local water. Oscar winner from Steven Soderbergh, with the late Albert Finney. Strong language.

programme.title: Lost In Translation
programme.desc: Bored in a Tokyo hotel, Bill Murray and Scarlett Johansson share an unlikely brief encounter. Oscar-winning romance. Contains sexual scenes.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Megastar singer Whitney Houston hires bodyguard Kevin Costner to protect her from a stalker. Oscar-nominated romantic drama.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Can baseball coach Brad Pitt and stat man Jonah Hill turn the struggling, cash-strapped Oakland 'A's into a top team? Drama with Philip Seymour Hoffman. Strong language.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Oscar-winning Sandra Bullock plays a wealthy mum who takes in a boy from a broken home and helps him achieve his pro football dreams. Drama. Violence/mild sexual references.(123mins).

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: Two best friends have their relationship tested when one of them falls ill with cancer. Drama with Toni Collette and Drew Barrymore.

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: A WWII psychiatrist evaluates Nazi leaders before the Nuremberg trials, growing obsessed with understanding evil as he bonds with Hermann Göring.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Can baseball coach Brad Pitt and stat man Jonah Hill turn the struggling, cash-strapped Oakland 'A's into a top team? Drama with Philip Seymour Hoffman. Strong language.

programme.title: DC League Of Super Pets
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson stars as the voice of Krypto the Super-Dog, who must convince a rag-tag shelter pack to rescue the Justice League.

programme.title: Across the Desert
programme.desc: Tafiti, a young meerkat, initially rejects friendship with Bristles, a bush pig. When his grandpa is bitten by a snake, Tafiti sets off to find the flower for the cure.

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A young mystic must learn to control the elements to save his kingdom from a destructive war. Action-packed adaptation of the hit animation. Moderate violence.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: A man and his dog are fused together to turn into Dog Man. They must stop a cat from cloning himself and creating an evil kitten.

programme.title: The Secret Life Of Pets 2
programme.desc: Sequel to the hit film about the adventures of our pets that we don't see when we leave home. With the voices of Kevin Hart and Harrison Ford.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The turtles are back battling bad guys when Shredder busts out of custody and teams up with Krang.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their new lives, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home. Delightful big-screen adaptation of the beloved books.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: When everyone's favourite marmalade-loving bear is framed, the Brown family must fight to clear his name. Top family sequel with Hugh Grant.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: Two kids discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and their grandfather's legacy. Paul Rudd stars.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: Discover the untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron's friendship on Cybertron. Animated sci-fi with the voice of Chris Hemsworth.

programme.desc: The turtles are back battling bad guys when Shredder busts out of custody and teams up with Krang.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz survives the harsh environments of an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals.

programme.title: The Wiz
programme.desc: The Wizard of Oz meets Motown. Funky overhaul of the evergreen adventure, starring Diana Ross as Dorothy. With Michael Jackson and Richard Pryor. Contains flashing images.

programme.title: An Officer And A Gentleman
programme.desc: Classic romantic drama starring Richard Gere as a troubled trainee naval officer who falls for Debra Winger's sassy factory girl. Strong language/moderate sex and nudity.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: A desperate couple reluctantly choose unreliable uncle John Candy to look after their children. Madcap John Hughes comedy, with Macaulay Culkin. Stereo sound only.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: An investor and con artist find their positions reversed as part of a bet by two millionaires. Comedy starring Eddie Murphy. Contains discriminatory content.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own
programme.desc: In WWII, while the men are on the battlefield, the women are on the playing field. Tom Hanks and Madonna star in a feelgood baseball tale.

programme.title: Terms Of Endearment
programme.desc: Oscar-winning tearjerker about the fraught relationship between eccentric Shirley MacLaine and headstrong daughter Debra Winger. With Jack Nicholson. Strong language/sex.

programme.title: The Shawshank Redemption
programme.desc: A man is thrown into the brutality of prison life when he gets two life sentences for a crime he claims he didn't commit. Drama starring Tim Robbins and Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: An investor and con artist find their positions reversed as part of a bet by two millionaires. Comedy starring Eddie Murphy. Contains discriminatory content.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: A desperate couple reluctantly choose unreliable uncle John Candy to look after their children. Madcap John Hughes comedy, with Macaulay Culkin. Stereo sound only.

programme.title: Planes, Trains & Automobiles
programme.desc: Anxious to get home for the holidays, exec Steve Martin is forced to hit the road with sales oaf John Candy. Classic comic caper. Strong language/flashing images.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A plucky caddy needs to raise money for college, but he'll have to endure the wild members of his golf club to do it. Comedy with Chevy Chase. Sexual references/nudity.

programme.title: Singin' In The Rain
programme.desc: In one of the most acclaimed musicals of all time, silent movie actors Gene Kelly and Jean Hagen make a toe-tapping transition into the new-fangled era of the talkies.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Mel Brooks' satire about the first black sheriff in an all-white town. Strong language/discriminatory content.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: Dustin Hoffman plays an out of work actor who, out of desperation, pretends to be a woman to get a part on a soap opera. Classic comedy with an Oscar-winning Jessica Lange.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Drunken playboy Dudley Moore stands to lose his inheritance when he falls for waitress Liza Minnelli. John Gielgud won an Oscar as his acid-tongued butler. Strong language.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Comedy starring Gene Wilder as a deaf news-stand owner, who is framed for murder with his blind assistant. Language/mature themes/flashing images/discriminatory content.

programme.title: Singin' In The Rain
programme.desc: In one of the most acclaimed musicals of all time, silent movie actors Gene Kelly and Jean Hagen make a toe-tapping transition into the new-fangled era of the talkies.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee wearies of a life dedicated to producing honey and decides to leave his hive. During his foray into the wider world, he befriends a florist. However, when he realises what becomes of the honey his species toils so hard to make, he resolves to sue the entire human race for stealing from his fellow creatures. Animated comedy, with the voices of Jerry Seinfeld, Renee Zellweger and Chris Rock.

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: A streetwise cat has the perfect money-making scam after finding a pipe-playing kid who has a horde of strangely literate rats. Animated adventure based on the Terry Pratchett story, featuring the voices of Hugh Laurie, Emilia Clarke and David Thewlis.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Family Favourites
programme.desc: Discover some of the very best Sky Originals to watch with the whole family, from Monster Family to The Amazing Maurice.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Unable to remember the details of the night before, they set about piecing the clues together in the hope of finding their missing friend. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Drinking buddies Phil and Stu try to help their troubled friend Alan get his life in order, only to stumble into another bizarre misadventure. The Mob have taken Alan's brother hostage and to free him, they have to track down manic gangster Mr Chow, who has escaped from a Thai prison. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis and John Goodman.

programme.desc: Epic action as Navy scrappers Taylor Kitsch, Liam Neeson and Alexander Skarsgard face an alien armada. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Gravity
programme.desc: When disaster hits, astronauts Sandra Bullock and George Clooney are left fighting for survival in space. Stunning winner of seven Oscars.

programme.title: Men In Black: International
programme.desc: The Men in Black are back to take down a new global threat - a mole within their own organisation. Starring Chris Hemsworth and Tessa Thompson.

programme.title: Arrival
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecrafts appear around the world, a linguist works with the military to communicate with the extraterrestrial passengers. Sci-fi drama.

programme.title: Interstellar
programme.desc: Christopher Nolan's awe-inspiring sci-fi epic stars Matthew McConaughey and Anne Hathaway as explorers tasked with securing humanity's survival.

programme.title: Edge Of Tomorrow: Live
programme.desc: Die. Repeat: Army officer Tom Cruise gets stuck in a time-loop that sees him doing battle with aliens time and again.

programme.title: The Shining
programme.desc: Caretaking a remote hotel, writer Jack Nicholson slowly succumbs to murderous insanity. Stanley Kubrick directs this unsettling horror classic. Contains violent scenes.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: Would it kill you to smile? Pop star Skye Riley faces increasingly terrifying events, leading her down a dark path into her past. Horror sequel.

programme.title: Cloverfield
programme.desc: A group of friends keep the cameras rolling as a skyscraper-sized monster rampages through Manhattan. Found-footage creature feature. Violence/mature themes.

programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane
programme.desc: A woman involved in a car accident wakes up in a cramped underground bunker with two men she's never met. Tense thriller.

programme.title: The Parenting
programme.desc: Planning to introduce their parents to each other, a couple find that their rental is home to a poltergeist. Contains discriminatory language.

programme.title: Friendship's Death
programme.desc: When aliens send a female android diplomat to Earth, she accidentally lands in war-torn Palestine, where she meets a friendly British journalist.

programme.title: Companion
programme.desc: A getaway turns to chaos when it's revealed that one of the guests, a subservient android built for human companionship, has gone haywire.

programme.title: Aeon Flux
programme.desc: In the last city on Earth, super assassin Charlize Theron fights to overthrow the sinister government. Futuristic action with Jonny Lee Miller. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Paycheck
programme.desc: Ben Affleck sells three years of his memory, but on payday there's no cash and he's wanted for murder. Sci-fi based on a story by Philip K Dick. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: In the distant future, father and son Will and Jaden Smith crash land on an abandoned Earth, which has evolved to destroy human life. Sci-fi epic. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Pacific Rim
programme.desc: Colossal manpowered robots clash with gigantic aliens in a supersized battle for Earth. Brilliant sci-fi action from Guillermo Del Toro.

programme.title: Mousehunt
programme.desc: Lee Evans and Nathan Lane are the bumbling brothers whose plans to renovate a valuable building are thwarted by a super smart rodent. Comedy with Christopher Walken.

programme.title: Tim Burton's Corpse Bride
programme.desc: A nervy bridegroom practising his vows in a graveyard inadvertently finds himself with an undead spouse. Wild fantasy animation.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: When Captain Hook kidnaps his kids, an adult Peter Pan returns to Neverland to save them. Adventure starring Robin Williams. Flashing images.

programme.title: The BFG
programme.desc: Adaptation of the beloved Roald Dahl tale starring Mark Rylance as the lovable giant who befriends a headstrong young orphan. From Steven Spielberg.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: When genetically-engineered dinosaurs break loose on a remote island, a group of experts are on the menu. Classic from Steven Spielberg. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: In this hit sequel to Jurassic Park, scientists discover a second dinosaur island which has been untouched - until now... Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's hugely successful sci-fi drama about a young boy who makes friends with a stranded alien. With Drew Barrymore and Henry Thomas. Contains flashing images.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Police chief Roy Scheider hunts the killer shark menacing his peaceful seaside community. Spielberg's classic thriller. Language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: Leo DiCaprio stars as the teen conman who led the FBI on a paper chase, with Tom Hanks as the agent on his trail. Real-life caper from Steven Spielberg. Strong language.

programme.title: Empire Of The Sun
programme.desc: Spoilt youngster Christian Bale fights to survive a Japanese POW camp alongside American scrounger John Malkovich. Epic WWII drama from Steven Spielberg.

programme.title: The Girl On The Train
programme.desc: Adaptation of the hit book starring Emily Blunt as an alcoholic divorcee caught up in a missing person case that sends shockwaves throughout her life.

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: When a young girl disappears, a series of past disappearances begin to link together, altering a broken family's history. Thriller.

programme.title: Trap
programme.desc: The latest mystery thriller by M Night Shyamalan sees a father and his teen daughter attend a deadly pop concert. With Josh Harnett.

programme.title: The Girl On The Train
programme.desc: Adaptation of the hit book starring Emily Blunt as an alcoholic divorcee caught up in a missing person case that sends shockwaves throughout her life.

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: Wild-eyed Brooklyn bank robbers Al Pacino and John Cazale are forced to take hostages after a bungled heist. Oscar-winning crime drama. Contains strong language.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Retired tough guy Denzel Washington returns to his old ways to protect a girl from Russian gangsters. Slick thriller with Chloe Grace Moretz.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: Denzel Washington returns as retired CIA agent Robert McCall, who is drawn back into action on a quest for revenge in this fast-paced thriller.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A dream holiday turns into a nightmare when an American family stay at a British couple's idyllic estate. Horror with James McAvoy.

programme.title: Eye In The Sky
programme.desc: Helen Mirren stars as a no-nonsense British colonel trying to get the go ahead for a drone strike. Thriller with the late Alan Rickman.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: When his beloved wife, Kathryn, is suspected of betraying the nation, intelligence agent George Woodhouse faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: One Last Deal
programme.desc: A veteran sports agent races to secure a final lucrative contract for his star client, as both their careers and lives hang in the balance. Starring Danny Dyer.

programme.title: The Krays
programme.desc: Gritty crime drama about gangsters Reggie and Ronnie Kray (Gary and Martin Kemp), who terrorised East London during the 1960s. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie (Kristen Wiig) is a single woman whose own life is a mess, but when she learns that her lifelong best friend, Lillian (Maya Rudolph), is engaged, she has no choice but to serve as the maid of honor. programme.title: Time Freak
programme.desc: Dumped by his girlfriend, a young physics genius travels back in time to change the past and win her heart again.

programme.title: Purple Violets

programme.desc: In 2008, during the last month of summer before high school begins, an impressionable 13-year-old Taiwanese American boy learns what his family can't teach him: how to skate, how to flirt, and how to love his mom.

Dick, "Minority Report" is an action-detective thriller set in Washington D.C. in 2054, where police utilize a psychic technology to arrest and convict murderers before they commit their crime. Tom Cruise plays the head of this Precrime unit and is himself accused of the future murder of a man he hasn't even met.

programme.title: Bandslam
programme.desc: A gifted singer/songwriter, Charlotte hires Will Burton, a new guy in town, to manage her fledgling rock band. She wants one thing from him: to help her win a contest against her ex-boyfriend in an upcoming battle of the bands. Charlotte's band comes together and seems to have a real shot at victory, while Will and dynamic guitarist Sa5m begin to make some beautiful music of their own.

programme.title: Centurion: The Dancing Stallion

As she starts teaching the handsome but previously abused Centurion, Ellissia falls critically ill, which keeps her from competing in a celebrated equestrian event. Under the watchful eyes of her father, new ranch hand Danny steps in as trainer, hoping to win the competition - and, perhaps, Ellissia's heart.

programme.desc: Young Thurgood Marshall faces one of his greatest challenges while working as a lawyer for the NAACP. He soon teams up with Sam Friedman, a local Jewish lawyer who's never handled a criminal case. Together, the two men build a defense whi

programme.title: I Wish You All the Best
programme.desc: A high school junior comes out as nonbinary and is thrown out of their family's home. With nowhere else to turn, they move in with their estranged older sister and her husband. After enrolling in a new school, they find support from an eccentric art teacher and form an unexpected bond with a kindhearted student.

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Dockworker Ray Ferrier (Tom Cruise) struggles to build a positive relationship with his two children, Rachel (Dakota Fanning) and Robbie (Justin Chatwin). When his ex-wife, Mary Ann (Miranda Otto), drops them off at Ferrier's house, it seems as though it will be just another tension-filled weekend. However, when electromagnetic pulses of lightning strike the area, the strange event turns out to be

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Newly hired as a producer on a national morning-news program called "Daybreak," Becky Fuller (Rachel McAdams) decides to revitalize the low-rated show by bringing in legendary anchorman Mike Pomeroy (Harrison Ford). programme.title: Conclave
programme.desc: Cardinal Lawrence has one of the world's most secretive and ancient events, participating in the selection of a new pope. Surrounded by powerful religious leaders in the halls of the Vatican, he soon uncovers a trail of deep secrets that could shake the very foundation of the Roman Catholic Church.

programme.title: Surfer, Dude
programme.desc: Steve Addington is a professional surfer and beach bum who lives to ride the waves. Content simply to live in the moment, he has a dilemma when his finances dry up and businessman Eddie Zarno offers to hire him for a virtual reality game. Since there are suddenly no good waves in the ocean, Addington must reconsider Zarno's offer and ponder his place in the world. Struggling with the choice, Addin

programme.title: Judas Kiss
programme.desc: The shooting of a U.S. senator's wife raises the stakes for kidnappers (Simon Baker-Denny, Gil Bellows, Carla Gugino) seeking a hefty ransom for a computer magnate.

programme.title: Tenderness
programme.desc: Detective Cristofano investigates the murder of a family, and has to figure out if a violent teen is responsible.

programme.title: Singing in my Sleep
programme.desc: A teenage songwriter is stuck living in the shadow of her deceased Dad's music legacy when the 20-year anniversary of his debut album forces her to face his abandonment.

programme.title: Bart Got a Room
programme.desc: Everyone is searching for love in director Brian Hecker's semi-autobiographical story. Danny Stein, a high school senior at the bottom of the social food chain, needs a prom date. As a cause of anxiety for Danny, Bart Beeber, the nerdiest guy in school, has already found a date -- and booked a hotel room. At the same time, Danny's divorced parents are both looking for relationships again.

programme.title: The Young and Prodigious T.S. Spivet
programme.desc: T.S. is invited to the Smithsonian to receive an award for inventing a perpetual motion machine. Without telling any of his family, he boards a freight train heading to Washington, D.C., to attend the ceremony.

programme.title: Doogal
programme.desc: Florence and her animal friends live in the Enchanted Village, which is under the care of Zebedee, a kindly wizard. However, a dark cloud is approaching this sunny world. After being encased in ice for eons, Zeebad, the evil double of Zebedee, reappears and threatens to start another ice age. The only way to stop him is for Florence and friends to find three magic diamonds before he does.

programme.title: Puppy Swap: Love Unleashed
programme.desc: An engaged couple adopts two puppies. When they decide to split up, the puppies hatch a plan to bring the two back together.

programme.title: Love and Death on Long Island

Forster novel, but instead finds himself watching a tacky teen sex comedy. Coerced into working for a crime boss, Baby must face the music as a doomed heist threatens his life, love and freedom.

Live gators nearly chomp maniac Steve-O. Fi

programme.desc: Irascible Irving Zisman and his young and impressionable grandson, Billy, set out on a road trip across America. programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa 0.5
programme.desc: Irving Zisman takes his young and impressionable grandson on a cross-country trip in which they encounter male strippers, biker-bar patrons and other unsuspecting citizens.

programme.title: Seaside
programme.desc: A woman decides to run away to the Oregon coast with her boyfriend when he inherits a family beach house.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: Undisputed II: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Imprisoned in Russia, a man (Michael Jai White) relies on his street-fighting skills while fighting boxers in the ring.

programme.title: Undisputed III: Redemption

programme.title: Black Lotus
programme.desc: A soldier uses his military training to rescue the kidnapped daughter of his dead friend.

programme.title: True Grit

The bickering duo are not alone in their quest, for a Texas Ranger named LaBoeuf is also tracking Chaney for reasons of his own. programme.title: 3 Days to Kill
programme.desc: Facing a terminal disease, spy Ethan Renner (Kevin Costner) has decided to give up his dangerous, high-stakes life in order to rebuild his relationship with his estranged wife and daughter (Hailee Steinfeld), whom he previously pushed away to keep them out of harm's way. However, in exchange for a potentially lifesaving drug, he must complete one final mission: apprehend one of the world's most ru

programme.title: Killerman
programme.desc: Moe Diamond is a New York City money launderer who wakes up with no memory and millions of dollars in stolen cash and drugs. He must soon scour the streets in search of answers while trying to dodge a crew of violent and crooked cops.

programme.title: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Amsterdam Vallon (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a young Irish immigrant released from prison. He returns to the Five Points seeking revenge against his father's killer, William Cutting (Daniel Day-Lewis), a powerful anti-immigrant gang leader. programme.title: Most Wanted

However, in exchange for a potentially lifesaving drug, he must complete one final mission: apprehend one of the world's most ru

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: A renegade Vulcan makes Kirk (William Shatner), Spock (Leonard Nimoy), McCoy (DeForest Kelley) and the Enterprise go to a planet at the center of the galaxy.

programme.title: Hard Eight
programme.desc: A stranger (Philip Baker Hall) mentors a young Reno gambler (John C. Reilly) who weds a hooker (Gwyneth Paltrow) and befriends a vulgar casino regular.

programme.title: Ishaqzaade
programme.desc: Two lovers from rival political families defy hatred to be together. Their passionate romance turns tragic, revealing the destructive power of ego, violence, and forbidden love.

programme.title: Hulla
programme.desc: Raj and his wife expect peace in the their new flat. But thanks to the watchman's whistle Raj becomes sleep-deprived.

programme.title: Pyaar Impossible
programme.desc: In Singapore, Abhay meets his college classmate Alisha. To get closer to her, he takes up the role of a nanny for her daughter, leading to unexpected bonds and challenges.

programme.title: Atithi Tum Kab Jaoge
programme.desc: A working couple has an unexpected visitor who does not want to leave.

programme.title: Housefull 3
programme.desc: Three men pretend to be disabled to win over wealthy women, leading to hysterical confusion. With witty humor and nonstop twists, it's a classic dose of the franchise's comic madness.

programme.title: Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani
programme.desc: A group of friends navigate love, dreams, and chaos. Their journey celebrates youth, friendship, and romance, creating memories that last forever.

programme.title: Sultan
programme.desc: Sultan Ali Khan, a former wrestler, quits after his son's death. Years later, he returns to the sport, seeking prize money and redemption, determined to reclaim his lost respect.

programme.title: Student Of The Year
programme.desc: Abhi and Rohan's friendship is ruined when they compete to win the Student of The Year title and Abhi falls in love with Rohan's girlfriend.

programme.title: Bang Bang
programme.desc: A mysterious man on the run crosses paths with a simple woman, dragging her into a globe-trotting adventure filled with espionage, romance, and thrilling action sequences across exotic locations.

programme.title: Maharaj
programme.desc: Based on a real-life historic court case, a bold journalist questions a revered leader's immoral behavior.

programme.title: Motichoor Chaknachoor
programme.desc: Anita dreams of marrying a foreign-settled man. She chooses Pushpinder, a Dubai-returned bachelor desperate for a bride, but their expectations clash in hilarious and heartfelt ways.

programme.title: Pyaar Tune Kya Kiya
programme.desc: Ria falls in love with Jai, a photographer, who is already married to Geeta. But Ria is determined to force Jai to accept her - by hook or by crook.

programme.title: Bala
programme.desc: A young man battling premature balding faces ridicule and insecurity. Through humor and self-realization, he learns that confidence and self-acceptance define beauty beyond physical appearance.

programme.title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa
programme.desc: A psychiatrist unravels strange events in an ancestral mansion haunted by secrets. As science clashes with superstition, a shocking truth emerges in this gripping psychological horror-comedy.

programme.title: Kuch Kuch Hota Hai
programme.desc: Anjali loves her best friend Rahul but is heartbroken when he marries Tina. Years later, Rahul's daughter, knowing their past, sets out to reunite him with Anjali, hoping for a second chance at love.

programme.title: Sunny Sanskari Ki Tulsi Kumari
programme.desc: After their partners, Ananya and Vikram, heartlessly dump them to marry each other, Sunny and Tulsi form an unlikely alliance. Together, they plot to gatecrash their exes' big wedding.

programme.title: Aavesham
programme.desc: Three engineering students arrive in Bangalore for their studies but soon get caught in a conflict. Struggling to handle the situation, they turn to a local gangster for help, risking everything.
